proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (higher age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months in this cohort.
Female patients (sex_female=1) have longer pfs_months than male patients (sex_female=0).
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage-IV disease.
Presence of brain metastases (has_brain_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Linear regression PFS ~ age_years (n=50000): slope=0.1699 months/year (SE=0.0007), p=0.
Female (n=22371) mean PFS=3.319 mo; male (n=27629) mean PFS=3.523 mo; diff=-0.204, t-test p=7.7e-25.
PFS ~ ecog_ps (continuous 0/1/2): slope=-1.0992 mo/level (SE=0.0139), p=0; mean PFS by ECOG: 0=4.33, 1=3.19, 2=2.15.
Stage IV (n=32365) PFS=2.925 mo; non-stage-IV (n=17635) PFS=4.362 mo; diff=-1.438, p=0.
Brain mets (n=12584) PFS=2.743 mo; none (n=37416) PFS=3.663 mo; diff=-0.921, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adenocarcinoma histology is associated with longer pfs_months than squamous histology.
Smoking status is associated with pfs_months — specifically, current smokers have shorter pfs_months than never-smokers.
EGFR mutation (egfr_mutation=1) is associated with longer pfs_months in the overall cohort.
KRAS G12C mutation (kras_g12c=1) is associated with longer pfs_months in the overall cohort.
ALK fusion (alk_fusion=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months in the overall cohort.
STK11 mutation (stk11_mutation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months in the overall cohort.
BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months in the overall cohort.
High tumor mutational burden (tmb_high=1) is associated with longer pfs_months in the overall cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Adenocarcinoma (n=36099) PFS=3.670 mo; squamous (n=13901) PFS=2.813 mo; diff=0.857, p=0.
ANOVA PFS by smoking_status: never (n=7459, mean=3.675), former (n=27567, mean=3.607), current (n=14974, mean=2.987); F=432.995, p=3.65e-187. Effect estimate is current minus never.
egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517) PFS=3.596 mo; egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483) PFS=3.407 mo; diff=0.189, p=6.48e-11.
alk_fusion=1 (n=2464) PFS=2.661 mo; alk_fusion=0 (n=47536) PFS=3.472 mo; diff=-0.810, p=5.61e-66.
stk11_mutation=1 (n=7451) PFS=3.439 mo; stk11_mutation=0 (n=42549) PFS=3.430 mo; diff=0.009, p=0.741.
brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519) PFS=3.316 mo; brca2_mutation=0 (n=48481) PFS=3.435 mo; diff=-0.119, p=0.0312.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps is associated with longer pfs_months in the overall cohort.
Higher serum albumin (albumin_g_dl) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater 6-month weight loss (weight_loss_pct_6mo) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher CRP (crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

Routine chemistries (hemoglobin_g_dl, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, ast_u_l, alt_u_l, total_bilirubin_mg_dl, creatinine_mg_dl, bun_mg_dl, sodium_meq_l, potassium_meq_l, calcium_mg_dl) each have nontrivial univariate associations with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS PFS ~ pdl1_tps (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.06671 mo per unit (SE=0.04715), p=0.157.
OLS PFS ~ albumin_g_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.44109 mo per unit (SE=0.01981), p=2.8e-109.
OLS PFS ~ ldh_u_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.00051 mo per unit (SE=0.00012), p=3.55e-05.
OLS PFS ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.07329 mo per unit (SE=0.00256), p=7.48e-179.
OLS PFS ~ crp_mg_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.00031 mo per unit (SE=0.00110), p=0.776.
OLS PFS ~ nlr (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.00390 mo per unit (SE=0.00479), p=0.416.
OLS PFS ~ hemoglobin_g_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.00180 mo per unit (SE=0.00557), p=0.746.
OLS PFS ~ alkaline_phosphatase_u_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.00030 mo per unit (SE=0.00020), p=0.144.
OLS PFS ~ ast_u_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.00033 mo per unit (SE=0.00085), p=0.702.
OLS PFS ~ alt_u_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.00105 mo per unit (SE=0.00082), p=0.199.
OLS PFS ~ total_bilirubin_mg_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.02625 mo per unit (SE=0.03159), p=0.406.
OLS PFS ~ creatinine_mg_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.04135 mo per unit (SE=0.03353), p=0.218.
OLS PFS ~ bun_mg_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.00131 mo per unit (SE=0.00200), p=0.514.
OLS PFS ~ sodium_meq_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.00236 mo per unit (SE=0.00332), p=0.478.
OLS PFS ~ potassium_meq_l (univariate, n=50000): slope=0.01930 mo per unit (SE=0.01987), p=0.332.
OLS PFS ~ calcium_mg_dl (univariate, n=50000): slope=-0.02112 mo per unit (SE=0.01993), p=0.289.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment with pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab in the overall cohort.
Treatment with sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no sotorasib in the overall cohort.
Treatment with olaparib (treatment_olaparib=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib in the overall cohort.
Treatment with osimertinib (treatment_osimertinib=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no osimertinib in the overall cohort.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=25008) PFS=3.414 mo vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (n=24992) PFS=3.449 mo; diff=-0.035, t-test p=0.0811.
treatment_sotorasib=1 (n=17544) PFS=3.641 mo vs treatment_sotorasib=0 (n=32456) PFS=3.319 mo; diff=0.322, t-test p=5.62e-49.
treatment_olaparib=1 (n=14999) PFS=3.414 mo vs treatment_olaparib=0 (n=35001) PFS=3.439 mo; diff=-0.025, t-test p=0.256.
treatment_osimertinib=1 (n=14976) PFS=3.434 mo vs treatment_osimertinib=0 (n=35024) PFS=3.431 mo; diff=0.004, t-test p=0.87.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, histology, smoking_status, all biomarkers (egfr_mutation, kras_g12c, alk_fusion, stk11_mutation, brca2_mutation, tmb_high, pdl1_tps), and key labs (albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, hemoglobin_g_dl), each treatment retains a positive main effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_pembrolizumab (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=-0.0056 mo (SE=0.0065), p=0.389.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_sotorasib (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=0.3228 mo (SE=0.0068), p=0.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_olaparib (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=0.0024 mo (SE=0.0071), p=0.731.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_osimertinib (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=0.0012 mo (SE=0.0071), p=0.865.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Osimertinib increases pfs_months specifically in EGFR-mutant patients (egfr_mutation=1), with no benefit in EGFR-wild-type patients.
There is a positive treatment_osimertinib × egfr_mutation interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ subgroup: osimertinib (n=1973) PFS=3.586 mo vs no-osimertinib (n=4544) PFS=3.600 mo; diff=-0.014, t-test p=0.808.
EGFR- subgroup: osimertinib (n=13003) PFS=3.411 mo vs no-osimertinib (n=30480) PFS=3.405 mo; diff=0.006, p=0.805.
OLS PFS ~ treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation: interaction coef=-0.0199 (SE=0.0646), p=0.758; main osi coef=0.0058, main EGFR coef=0.1949.
Adjusted OLS interaction coef for treatment_osimertinib × egfr_mutation = -0.0108 (SE=0.0245), p=0.659.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Sotorasib increases pfs_months specifically in KRAS G12C-mutant patients (kras_g12c=1), with no benefit in KRAS G12C-wild-type patients.
There is a positive treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS G12C+ subgroup: sotorasib (n=2246) PFS=5.766 mo vs no-sotorasib (n=4122) PFS=3.213 mo; diff=2.552, p=1.66e-202.
KRAS G12C- subgroup: sotorasib (n=15298) PFS=3.329 mo vs no-sotorasib (n=28334) PFS=3.334 mo; diff=-0.005, p=0.799.
OLS PFS ~ treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c: interaction coef=2.5577 (SE=0.0611), p=0; main soto coef=-0.0054, main KRAS coef=-0.1206.
Adjusted OLS interaction coef for treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c = 2.5386 (SE=0.0188), p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab increases pfs_months more in tmb_high=1 patients than in tmb_high=0 patients (positive treatment_pembrolizumab × tmb_high interaction).
Pembrolizumab increases pfs_months more in patients with high pdl1_tps (>=0.5) than in low-pdl1 patients (positive treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_high interaction).
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_tps (continuous) interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: TMB-high subgroup: pembro (n=7111) PFS=3.272 mo vs no-pembro (n=7147) PFS=3.320 mo; diff=-0.048, p=0.2.
TMB-low subgroup: pembro (n=17897) PFS=3.471 mo vs no-pembro (n=17845) PFS=3.501 mo; diff=-0.030, p=0.203.
OLS PFS ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high: interaction coef=-0.0179 (SE=0.0442), p=0.685.
Adjusted OLS interaction coef for treatment_pembrolizumab × tmb_high = -0.0124 (SE=0.0168), p=0.459.
PDL1>=0.5 subgroup: pembro (n=5342) PFS=3.407 mo vs no-pembro (n=5407) PFS=3.477 mo; diff=-0.070, p=0.106.
PDL1<0.5 subgroup: pembro (n=19666) PFS=3.416 mo vs no-pembro (n=19585) PFS=3.441 mo; diff=-0.025, p=0.264.
OLS PFS ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_high (>=0.5): interaction coef=-0.0449 (SE=0.0486), p=0.356.
OLS PFS ~ pembro * pdl1_tps (continuous): interaction coef=-0.1164 (SE=0.0943), p=0.217.
Joint OLS PFS ~ pembro*pdl1_tps + pembro*tmb_high: pembro×pdl1_tps coef=-0.1092, p=0.246; pembro×tmb_high coef=-0.0181, p=0.682. Effect estimate reported is pembro×pdl1_tps.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib increases pfs_months specifically in BRCA2-mutant patients (brca2_mutation=1), with no benefit in BRCA2-wild-type.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ subgroup: olaparib (n=417) PFS=3.324 mo vs no-olaparib (n=1102) PFS=3.314 mo; diff=0.010, p=0.934.
BRCA2- subgroup: olaparib (n=14582) PFS=3.417 mo vs no-olaparib (n=33899) PFS=3.443 mo; diff=-0.026, p=0.236.
OLS PFS ~ olaparib * brca2: interaction coef=0.0367 (SE=0.1303), p=0.778.
Adjusted OLS interaction coef for treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation = 0.0323 (SE=0.0495), p=0.514.

proposed_hypotheses.text: STK11 mutation suppresses pembrolizumab efficacy: pembrolizumab increases pfs_months in STK11-WT patients but not in STK11-mutant patients (negative treatment_pembrolizumab × stk11_mutation interaction).

Within tmb_high=1 patients, the pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is concentrated in stk11_mutation=0 (i.e., positive 3-way pembrolizumab × tmb_high × stk11_mutation interaction such that tmb_high pembro benefit is suppressed when STK11 is mutated).

analyses.result_summary: STK11-mutant subgroup: pembro (n=3727) PFS=3.415 mo vs no-pembro (n=3724) PFS=3.464 mo; diff=-0.049, p=0.337.
STK11-WT subgroup: pembro (n=21281) PFS=3.414 mo vs no-pembro (n=21268) PFS=3.446 mo; diff=-0.032, p=0.136.
OLS PFS ~ pembro * stk11: interaction coef=-0.0162 (SE=0.0561), p=0.773.
TMB-high AND STK11-WT subgroup: pembro (n=6052) PFS=3.279 mo vs no-pembro (n=6096) PFS=3.335 mo; diff=-0.057, p=0.165.
TMB-high AND STK11-MUT subgroup: pembro (n=1059) PFS=3.233 mo vs no-pembro (n=1051) PFS=3.230 mo; diff=0.003, p=0.977.
OLS PFS ~ pembro * tmb_high * stk11: 3-way interaction coef=0.1041 (SE=0.1244), p=0.403; pembro×tmb coef=-0.0333, pembro×stk11 coef=-0.0448.
PDL1-high AND TMB-high AND STK11-WT subgroup: pembro (n=1373) PFS=3.334 mo vs no-pembro (n=1341) PFS=3.278 mo; diff=0.056, p=0.522.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pembrolizumab pfs_months benefit is concentrated in patients with good performance status (ecog_ps 0-1) versus ecog_ps=2.
Within the EGFR-mutant subgroup, osimertinib has a larger pfs_months benefit when patients have no brain metastases (has_brain_mets=0) than when they do.
Within the EGFR-mutant subgroup restricted to ecog_ps<=1 and stage_iv=0, osimertinib increases pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: ECOG 0-1 subgroup: pembro (n=21209) PFS=3.641 mo vs no-pembro (n=21310) PFS=3.672 mo; diff=-0.031, p=0.147.
ECOG 2 subgroup: pembro (n=3799) PFS=2.147 mo vs no-pembro (n=3682) PFS=2.157 mo; diff=-0.010, p=0.819.
EGFR+ AND no brain mets subgroup: osi (n=1470) PFS=3.803 mo vs no-osi (n=3412) PFS=3.832 mo; diff=-0.029, p=0.664.
EGFR+ AND brain mets subgroup: osi (n=503) PFS=2.953 mo vs no-osi (n=1132) PFS=2.902 mo; diff=0.051, p=0.639.
EGFR+ AND ECOG 0-1 AND not stage IV subgroup: osi (n=572) PFS=4.675 mo vs no-osi (n=1364) PFS=4.819 mo; diff=-0.144, p=0.163.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic treatment_pembrolizumab × feature interaction screen across binary and continuous features (sex_female, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, egfr_mutation, kras_g12c, alk_fusion, stk11_mutation, brca2_mutation, tmb_high, adeno, smoke_current, age_years, ecog_ps, pdl1_tps, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, hemoglobin_g_dl) will reveal at least one feature with a significant positive interaction (i.e., a subgroup with enhanced pembrolizumab benefit).
A systematic treatment_sotorasib × feature interaction screen will identify additional modifiers of sotorasib benefit beyond kras_g12c.
A systematic treatment_olaparib × feature interaction screen will identify at least one feature with a significant interaction effect on pfs_months.
A systematic treatment_osimertinib × feature interaction screen will identify at least one feature with a significant interaction effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_pembrolizumab × weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction coef=0.0184 (SE=0.0051), p=0.000315 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_pembrolizumab × stage_iv interaction coef=0.1077 (SE=0.0398), p=0.00677 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_pembrolizumab × kras_g12c interaction coef=-0.1135 (SE=0.0595), p=0.0565 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_pembrolizumab × egfr_mutation interaction coef=0.0986 (SE=0.0593), p=0.0964 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c interaction coef=2.5577 (SE=0.0611), p=0 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction coef=-0.5622 (SE=0.0419), p=5.3e-41 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_sotorasib × smoke_current interaction coef=0.2723 (SE=0.0452), p=1.72e-09 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_sotorasib × alk_fusion interaction coef=-0.4879 (SE=0.0964), p=4.13e-07 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_sotorasib × egfr_mutation interaction coef=-0.2407 (SE=0.0618), p=9.93e-05 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_olaparib × crp_mg_l interaction coef=0.0055 (SE=0.0024), p=0.0215 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_olaparib × stk11_mutation interaction coef=0.1097 (SE=0.0611), p=0.0728 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_olaparib × adeno interaction coef=0.0773 (SE=0.0479), p=0.106 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_osimertinib × alk_fusion interaction coef=0.2381 (SE=0.0999), p=0.0172 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_osimertinib × brca2_mutation interaction coef=-0.2540 (SE=0.1294), p=0.0496 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.
Treatment-x-feature interaction screen: treatment_osimertinib × stk11_mutation interaction coef=0.0613 (SE=0.0615), p=0.319 in unadjusted OLS for PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, the sotorasib pfs_months benefit is suppressed in females (sex_female=1): the treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction is large and negative within kras_g12c=1.
Sotorasib substantially increases pfs_months in KRAS G12C+ AND male (sex_female=0) patients but has no effect in KRAS G12C+ AND female patients.
Sotorasib has no effect on pfs_months in KRAS G12C-wild-type patients regardless of sex.

analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C+ patients only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * sex_female: interaction coef=-4.6561 (SE=0.1166), p=0; main soto coef=4.6441, main sex_female coef=-0.0415.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * sex_female: interaction coef=-4.6561 (SE=0.1166), p=0.
KRAS G12C+ AND male subgroup: soto (n=1237) PFS=7.876 mo vs no-soto (n=2271) PFS=3.232 mo; diff=4.644, p=0.
KRAS G12C+ AND female subgroup: soto (n=1009) PFS=3.179 mo vs no-soto (n=1851) PFS=3.191 mo; diff=-0.012, p=0.884.
KRAS G12C-WT AND male subgroup: soto (n=8539) PFS=3.315 mo vs no-soto (n=15582) PFS=3.334 mo; diff=-0.019, p=0.497.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, ALK fusion (alk_fusion=1) attenuates sotorasib benefit (negative treatment_sotorasib × alk_fusion interaction).
Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) attenuates sotorasib benefit (negative treatment_sotorasib × brca2_mutation interaction).
Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, STK11 mutation (stk11_mutation=1) attenuates sotorasib benefit.
Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, presence of brain metastases (has_brain_mets=1) attenuates sotorasib benefit.
Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup, smoking status modifies sotorasib benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * alk_fusion: interaction coef=-3.0162 (SE=0.3451), p=2.94e-18.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * brca2_mutation: interaction coef=-2.5497 (SE=0.4015), p=2.29e-10.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * stk11_mutation: interaction coef=-0.2609 (SE=0.2009), p=0.194.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * has_brain_mets: interaction coef=-0.3055 (SE=0.1574), p=0.0524.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * smoke_former: interaction coef=0.2215 (SE=0.1359), p=0.103.
Within KRAS G12C+ subset only (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * smoke_current: interaction coef=-0.1488 (SE=0.1362), p=0.275.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND current smoker subgroup: soto (n=572) PFS=7.461 mo vs no-soto (n=1060) PFS=2.942 mo; diff=4.519, p=1.64e-182.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND former smoker subgroup: soto (n=642) PFS=8.260 mo vs no-soto (n=1150) PFS=3.485 mo; diff=4.775, p=4.65e-210.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND never smoker subgroup: soto (n=23) PFS=7.487 mo vs no-soto (n=61) PFS=3.508 mo; diff=3.979, p=1.56e-08.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among KRAS G12C+ AND male patients, additional restriction to alk_fusion=0 yields the largest sotorasib pfs_months benefit (over 4.7 mo).
Among KRAS G12C+ AND male patients, additional restriction to brca2_mutation=0 yields a similarly large sotorasib pfs_months benefit.
Among KRAS G12C+ AND male patients with no ALK fusion, the sotorasib pfs_months benefit exceeds 4.5 months and is robust to other adjustments.

After adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain mets, histology, smoking, albumin, LDH, NLR, STK11, and ALK, sotorasib retains a large positive coefficient (>3.5 mo) within the KRAS G12C+ AND male subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib in KRAS G12C+ AND sex_female=0 AND alk_fusion=0 subgroup (n_tx=1191, n_ctrl=2179): PFS difference = 4.832 mo, p=0.
Sotorasib in KRAS G12C+ AND sex_female=0 AND brca2_mutation=0 subgroup (n_tx=1198, n_ctrl=2203): PFS difference = 4.797 mo, p=0.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND no ALK fusion subgroup: soto (n=1191) PFS=8.089 mo vs no-soto (n=2179) PFS=3.257 mo; diff=4.832, p=0.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND no ALK AND smoker (former or current): soto (n=1168) PFS=8.101 mo vs no-soto (n=2123) PFS=3.251 mo; diff=4.851, p=0.
Adjusted OLS in KRAS G12C+ AND male subgroup (n=3508): sotorasib coef=4.5864 mo (SE=0.0276), p=0, controlling for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain mets, histology, smoking, albumin, LDH, NLR, STK11, ALK.

proposed_hypotheses.text: An exhaustive subgroup search for olaparib across binary features (brca2_mutation, stk11_mutation, tmb_high, adeno, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, ecog_ps, egfr_mutation) will fail to identify any subgroup with a positive olaparib pfs_months benefit (i.e., olaparib has no efficacy in any subgroup).

An exhaustive subgroup search for osimertinib across binary features (egfr_mutation, stk11_mutation, tmb_high, adeno, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, alk_fusion) will fail to identify any subgroup with a positive osimertinib pfs_months benefit.

An exhaustive subgroup search for pembrolizumab across binary features (pdl1_high, tmb_high, stk11_mutation, adeno, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, egfr_mutation, kras_g12c, alk_fusion, brca2_mutation, smoke_current, smoke_former, smoke_never, sex_female) will fail to identify any subgroup with a meaningful positive pembrolizumab pfs_months benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Olaparib subgroup search: in adeno=0 (n_tx=4196, n_ctrl=9705), PFS difference = -0.078 mo, p=0.0507.
Olaparib subgroup search: in stk11_mutation=0 (n_tx=12754, n_ctrl=29795), PFS difference = -0.041 mo, p=0.083.
Olaparib subgroup search: in has_brain_mets=1 (n_tx=3714, n_ctrl=8870), PFS difference = -0.055 mo, p=0.184.
Osimertinib subgroup search: in alk_fusion=1 (n_tx=751, n_ctrl=1713), PFS difference = 0.231 mo, p=0.0179.
Osimertinib subgroup search: in stk11_mutation=1 (n_tx=2191, n_ctrl=5260), PFS difference = 0.056 mo, p=0.319.
Osimertinib subgroup search: in adeno=0 (n_tx=4120, n_ctrl=9781), PFS difference = 0.020 mo, p=0.612.
Pembrolizumab subgroup search: in stage_iv=0 (n_tx=8799, n_ctrl=8836), PFS difference = -0.102 mo, p=0.00209.
Pembrolizumab subgroup search: in egfr_mutation=0 (n_tx=21731, n_ctrl=21752), PFS difference = -0.048 mo, p=0.0258.
Pembrolizumab subgroup search: in adeno=0 (n_tx=7014, n_ctrl=6887), PFS difference = -0.074 mo, p=0.0425.
Pembrolizumab subgroup search: in kras_g12c=1 (n_tx=3186, n_ctrl=3182), PFS difference = -0.134 mo, p=0.0636.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within KRAS G12C+ patients, concurrent pembrolizumab does not modify the sotorasib pfs_months benefit (treatment_sotorasib × treatment_pembrolizumab interaction is null).
Within EGFR-mutant patients, concurrent pembrolizumab modifies the osimertinib effect on pfs_months (treatment_osimertinib × treatment_pembrolizumab interaction is non-null).

analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C+ patients (n=6368), OLS PFS ~ sotorasib * pembro: interaction coef=-0.2157 (SE=0.1369), p=0.115.
In EGFR+ patients (n=6517), OLS PFS ~ osi * pembro: interaction coef=0.2494 (SE=0.1166), p=0.0325.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL TREATMENT-EFFECT SUBGROUP HYPOTHESIS for sotorasib on pfs_months: Sotorasib substantially increases pfs_months (~+4.6 months) in patients who are KRAS G12C+ AND male (sex_female=0). The benefit is completely suppressed by female sex (sex_female=1), and is absent entirely in KRAS G12C-wild-type patients regardless of sex. Within KRAS G12C+ males, ALK fusion (alk_fusion=1) and BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) further attenuate the benefit; the cleanest responders are KRAS G12C+ AND male AND alk_fusion=0 AND brca2_mutation=0.

FINAL: For pembrolizumab, no subgroup defined by available biomarkers (pdl1_tps, tmb_high, stk11_mutation, kras_g12c, egfr_mutation, alk_fusion, brca2_mutation, sex_female, smoking_status, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets) shows a positive pfs_months treatment effect; pembrolizumab is essentially neutral throughout the cohort, with several subgroups even showing a small negative point estimate.

FINAL: For olaparib, no subgroup defined by available features (brca2_mutation, stk11_mutation, tmb_high, adeno, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, ecog_ps, egfr_mutation) shows a positive pfs_months treatment effect; olaparib is essentially neutral throughout the cohort.

FINAL: For osimertinib, no subgroup defined by available features (egfr_mutation, stk11_mutation, tmb_high, adeno, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, alk_fusion) shows a meaningful positive pfs_months treatment effect; osimertinib's effect is essentially null in EGFR+ patients and in EGFR-WT patients alike — the only weakly significant signal is osi_subgroup_alk_fusion_1 with effect 0.23 mo (p=0.018) and the within-EGFR+ pembro × osi interaction (coef +0.25, p=0.033), neither of which constitutes a clinically meaningful efficacy signal.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS G12C+ AND male subgroup: soto (n=1237) PFS=7.876 mo vs no-soto (n=2271) PFS=3.232 mo; diff=4.644, p=0.
KRAS G12C+ AND female subgroup: soto (n=1009) PFS=3.179 mo vs no-soto (n=1851) PFS=3.191 mo; diff=-0.012, p=0.884.
KRAS G12C+ AND male AND no ALK fusion subgroup: soto (n=1191) PFS=8.089 mo vs no-soto (n=2179) PFS=3.257 mo; diff=4.832, p=0.
Adjusted OLS in KRAS G12C+ AND male subgroup (n=3508): sotorasib coef=4.5864 mo (SE=0.0276), p=0, controlling for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain mets, histology, smoking, albumin, LDH, NLR, STK11, ALK.
Sotorasib in KRAS G12C+ AND sex_female=0 AND alk_fusion=0 subgroup (n_tx=1191, n_ctrl=2179): PFS difference = 4.832 mo, p=0.
Sotorasib in KRAS G12C+ AND sex_female=0 AND brca2_mutation=0 subgroup (n_tx=1198, n_ctrl=2203): PFS difference = 4.797 mo, p=0.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_pembrolizumab (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=-0.0056 mo (SE=0.0065), p=0.389.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_olaparib (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=0.0024 mo (SE=0.0071), p=0.731.
Adjusted OLS coef for treatment_osimertinib (controlling for age, sex, ECOG, stage, brain mets, histology, smoking, all biomarkers, and key labs): coef=0.0012 mo (SE=0.0071), p=0.865.
